examples.title: Finding Relative Position
examples.content: You're at (5,3). Your friend is at (2,1). Position of friend relative to you = (2-5, 1-3) = (-3,-2). Subtract to find relative position.

examples.title: Velocity Change
examples.content: You start moving at 10 m/s north. You stop at 5 m/s east. Change = Final - Initial = (5,0) - (0,10) = (5,-10). Shows how much you changed.

examples.title: Force Imbalance
examples.content: One rope pulls with 12 N right. Another pulls 5 N left. Net = 12 - 5 = 7 N right. Subtract to find what remains.
